description: Golden set for triage agent evaluation. Each entry has a human-assigned type and complexity.

issues.title: Fix typo in briefing agent docstring
issues.body: Line 42 of agents/briefing.py has 'recieve' instead of 'receive'.

issues.title: Add phone battery fact to profiler
issues.body: The profiler should read phone_connection.json and emit a battery_pct fact when the phone is connected.

issues.title: Scout agent crashes on empty Qdrant collection
issues.body: When the 'documents' collection is empty, scout.py throws a KeyError on line 87. Stack trace attached.

issues.title: Refactor voice perception to use strategy pattern
issues.body: The perception module has grown to 600+ lines with multiple if/elif chains. Refactor to use a strategy pattern for each input modality (wake word, voice command, gesture).

issues.title: Redesign the axiom governance system
issues.body: The current axiom system needs a complete overhaul to support multi-domain governance with hierarchical scoping.

issues.title: Update pytest fixtures for watch receiver tests
issues.body: Several watch receiver tests share fixture setup. Extract to conftest.py.

issues.title: Health monitor reports wrong check count
issues.body: Health monitor says 80/80 but there are actually 82 checks registered after the phone connectivity addition.

issues.title: Add drift detection for voice daemon config
issues.body: The drift detector should compare hapax-voice systemd unit configuration against the documented expected state in docs/voice-subsystem.md.

issues.title: Bump pydantic-ai to 1.65
issues.body: New release fixes async context manager leak. Update pyproject.toml and verify tests pass.

issues.title: Migrate from LiteLLM proxy to direct Anthropic SDK
issues.body: Remove the LiteLLM dependency and call Anthropic API directly from all agents. This touches every agent file and shared/config.py.
